## Testing

- [ ] Compiled the changed extension with `./gradlew --no-daemon :src:hi:<module>:compileDebugKotlin`

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is limited to maintained MSR sources
- [ ] `extVersionCode` was bumped when behavior changed
- [ ] No unrelated generated files are included
- [ ] Package/source identity is preserved for existing extensions
